summary: Frontend split testing complete. Fixed critical double-login bug in TeamLogin.js. All login flows work correctly - Admin, HR, RM, and Customer. Team routes have /team/ prefix, sidebar navigation links correct. Auth protection working - unauthenticated /team/* access redirects to /team/login. ChatBot hidden on team routes. Logout redirects to /team/login.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' hydration error - minor React structure issue but doesn't affect functionality
404 error fetching cities - minor API issue, page still loads correctly

customer_venue_search.note: Redirects to venue page, search works

team_login_page.note: VenuLoQ Team Portal login form renders, no splash screen

breadcrumb_links.note: Dashboard link in breadcrumbs points to /team/admin/dashboard

bugs_fixed.issue: Double login API call causing 422 error
bugs_fixed.cause: handleSubmit was calling api.post('/auth/login') directly AND then calling login() function from AuthContext which also makes the API call
bugs_fixed.fix: Removed direct api.post call, now only uses login() function from AuthContext which handles both API call and state update

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: AdminVenues and AdminUsers have table hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> - likely from a wrapper component
context_for_next_testing_agent: Frontend split to Customer App (App.js) and Team Portal (TeamApp.js) is complete and working. All /team/* routes require authentication and redirect to /team/login when not authenticated. All sidebar and breadcrumb links have correct /team/ prefix. Fixed double-login bug in TeamLogin.js. ChatBot and CompareFloatingBar hidden on team routes. Test credentials verified working.
